nasb.text: As they journeyed, there was a great terror upon the cities which were around them, and they did not pursue the sons of Jacob.

esv.text: And as they journeyed, a terror from God fell upon the cities that were around them, so that they did not pursue the sons of Jacob.

cnv.text: 他們出發了，　神使周圍的城市都非常懼怕，他們就不追趕雅各的兒子。

ccb.text: 他们就出发了，上帝使恐惧笼罩周围的城邑，没有人敢追赶他们。

csbs.text: 然后他们起程了。神使周围城邑的人都感到恐惧，因此他们就不追赶雅各的儿子们。
